notes: Pre-raid entry point for fresh 90s in the final MoP phase: Celestial Dungeons drop Siege of Orgrimmar Normal-level loot. Drafted from the Phase 5 pre-raid best-in-slot table on Icy Veins' Feral Druid pre-raid gear page (sources listed there simply as 'Celestial Dungeons'; boss attribution taken from the matching Siege of Orgrimmar drops). Enchants and gems match our SoO list (same patch). Draft from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides. ⚠ Rune of Re-Origination is a Throne of Thunder drop (Lei Shen) that Icy Veins still rates BiS for Feral — it does NOT drop in Celestial Dungeons despite the guide's source column; run ToT for it or use any SoO Normal agility trinket instead.
